decisions.title: Consolidate search into single module
decisions.rationale: hybrid_search, indexing, and search were fragmented across 5 files sharing the same data model and query patterns; merging reduces cognitive overhead and import complexity

decisions.title: Domain functions belong in their domain module
decisions.rationale: rank_related_decisions operated on decisions tables but lived in search.py, creating a misleading cross-domain dependency

decisions.title: Use re-export shims for backwards compatibility
decisions.rationale: Thin re-export modules avoid breaking existing imports across tests, MCP tools, and cross_repo while making the canonical location clear

decisions.title: Extract shared ID resolution to core/resolve.py
decisions.rationale: _resolve_assessment_id was copy-pasted between decisions.py and futures.py; decisions.py already had a generic _resolve_id that worked for any table

decisions.title: Extract shared CLI connection helper
decisions.rationale: find_git_root/get_db/check_and_migrate pattern was repeated verbatim across 17 CLI modules; cli/helpers.py reduces boilerplate

sessions.session_title: Refactor: reduce feature complexity and fragmentation
sessions.session_summary: Analyzed codebase architecture (15.6k LOC, 24 tables, 21 CLI modules). Consolidated 5 fragmented search modules into unified search.py. Moved rank_related_decisions to decisions.py (domain ownership). Extracted shared resolve.py for ID prefix-matching. Added cli/helpers.py for connection boilerplate. Recorded 5 architectural decisions. All 1081 tests pass.

checkpoints.diff_summary: Consolidate search modules, extract shared utilities, record 5 architectural decisions
